settings.title: A pro finish in 5 steps.
settings.lead: Follow this sequence every time for streak-free, long-lasting protection. Each step prepares the surface for the next.

items.title: Wash & dry
items.body: Use our pH-neutral shampoo with a soft wash mitt. Two-bucket method recommended. Rinse thoroughly, then dry with a 500 GSM microfibre towel — top to bottom.

items.title: Decontaminate
items.body: Run a clay bar or iron remover to pull out embedded fallout before any coating goes on. Spray an iron remover, wait 3–4 minutes, and rinse. Follow with a light clay bar pass over lubricated paint.

items.title: Apply the coating
items.body: Shake the ceramic spray for 10 seconds. Fold a suede applicator block in four, apply 4–6 sprays, and work panel-by-panel in cross-hatch strokes. Don't flood the surface.

items.title: Level & buff
items.body: After 1–2 minutes — watch for a light rainbow or 'high-spot' effect — flip to a clean, dry microfibre and buff off in straight lines. Work in the shade below 30°C.

items.title: Cure
items.body: Keep the car dry and out of rain for 24 hours. Full hardness develops over 7 days. Avoid automatic car washes and high-pressure rinses for the first week.

items.q: Can I apply this over an existing ceramic coating?
items.a: Yes — the spray is formulated to bond on top of existing coatings as a maintenance layer. Wash and dry first, then apply as normal.
Every 3–6 months depending on exposure and washing frequency. If water no longer beads into droplets, it's time.
Best between 10°C and 30°C in indirect light. Avoid direct sun — it causes the product to flash too quickly and leave high spots.

items.q: Can I use this on glass and wheels?
items.a: Yes for both. For wheels, ensure they are cool to the touch before applying. For glass, use a separate glass-safe microfibre.
